title: pinus laricio subsp. nigricans
intro: Pinus laricio subsp. nigricans, also known as the Calabrian pine or black pine, is a subspecies of pine tree native to the Mediterranean region. The resin of this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pinus laricio subsp. nigricans include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the resin, such as essential oils and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
